---
title: "News"
description: "News and announcements from ISA RC42 Social Psychology."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  feed: true
---

## RC42 News

Latest news, announcements, and updates from RC42 Social Psychology.

::: {.info-box}
To submit a news item, use the [contribution form](../participate/submit-contribution.qmd). All submissions are reviewed by the RC42 board before publication.
:::
